characters.name: Psycho Pete
characters.description: Psycho PetePortrayed byDominic BurgessAliasMild Mannered PeteBoring PeteImages of Psycho Pete Peter, better known asPsycho Pete, is the former leader of theFreight Train, the precursor tothe Gang, withCharlie,Mac, andDooley. Psycho Pete used to lead a group of friends calling themselves the Freight Train during their time atSaint Joseph's Preparatory School. Among other things, they would gather stray cats and dogs for fights and scream in the faces of babies. characters.name: Shelley Kelly
characters.description: Shelley KellyPortrayed byColm MeaneyAliasShirley(by Frank)FamilyCharlie Kelly(biological son)John Patrick Kelly(ancestor)William Kelly(ancestor)Michael Kelly(ancestor)RelationshipBonnie Kelly(ex-lover)JobOwner of Shelley Kelly's Cheese and JelliesImages of Shelley KellyShelley Kellyis a local cheesemonger from Ireland andCharlie Kelly's biological father. John Patrick Kelly(ancestor)William Kelly(ancestor)Michael Kelly(ancestor) Shelley is a large man, with grey, curly hair. He isn't known to wear any specific outfit. He is visibly somewhere around his 60's, and before being revealed was believed to be Charlie's long-lost brother.
